summary: Frontend WebSocket integration testing complete. All 8 requested features verified working correctly. Login flow, WebSocket connection, resync data, Live VAR calculation, priority distribution, priority list, connection status indicator, and sign out all functioning as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket integration with Zustand store is well-implemented with proper state management
Connection status indicator correctly shows Live/Connecting/Reconnecting states with pulse animation
Priority data correctly displays asset_name, priority_band, state_type, and value_at_risk_per_day
Total VAR calculation correctly sums individual priority VaR values ($151 + $19 + $43 = $212.6)
Auth context properly manages JWT tokens and passes them to WebSocket connection
No 'Made with Emergent' badge present as requested
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing demo data from first-five-minutes endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket integration fully working. Frontend connects to wss://ramp-industrial-ai.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws/priorities?token=JWT. Zustand store (useRAMPStore.js) handles connection state and message processing. Resync message contains priorities array with value_at_risk_per_day at root level. All 3 demo priorities display correctly with proper VaR values.

login_flow.details: Demo credentials button populates form, Sign In submits successfully

websocket_connection.details: Console shows '[RAMP WS] Connected to priorities channel' after login

websocket_resync.details: Resync received with 3 priorities containing asset_name, priority_band, value_at_risk_per_day

priority_list.details: Shows 3 priorities with asset names (Main Air Compressor, Process Chiller 1, Air Handling Unit 1), bands (HIGH, LOW, MEDIUM), state types (DRIFT, DEGRADATION), and VaR values

connection_status_indicator.details: Shows 'Live' with green pulsing indicator when connected

sign_out_button.details: Clicking Sign Out returns to login page

design_review.footer: Fixed at bottom, shows 'RAMP Command Centre' and Live indicator
design_review.priority_cards: Rounded corners, proper background, good contrast
